text.title: Drift Classification Taxonomy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: class = hand_edit; revert (default) or backport with approver
class = external_automation; boundary review (which tool owns this resource?)
class = vendor_change; provider-version bump + explicit HCL
class = legitimate_emergency; backport PR within 5 days
class = unknown; pause apply on this resource until evidence found
skip-this-methodology — preconditions in "Applies If" not satisfied

example.note: Drift evidence shows what? → matches branch "source == cloud_console_human" → conclusion ref=r4-hand-edit-revert-default
